title: Young mathematicians advance to provincials
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Fraaisig Primary School is...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Fraaisig Primary School is proud to announce that its Growsmart Mathematics team has advanced to the provincial finals of the prestigious Growsmart competition after a stellar performance in the semi-final round held last week.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Fraaisig Primary School is proud to announce that its Growsmart Mathematics team has advanced to the provincial finals of the prestigious Growsmart competition after a stellar performance in the semi-final round held last week."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The team of three exceptionally talented learners, Isenathi Jacobs, Luphelo Apleni and Khayone Siyo, demonstrated remarkable mathematical ability and teamwork, securing their well-deserved spot among the top teams in the Western Cape."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The provincial finals will take place in Cape Town on 13 September, where the Fraaisig team will compete against the best young mathematicians from across the province.","html":"The provincial finals will take place in Cape Town on 13 September, where the Fraaisig team will compete against the best young mathematicians from across the province."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""We are incredibly proud of our learners and their commitment to academic excellence," said the school's deputy principal, Ethon Alexander. "Their success in this competition reflects not only their talent but also the support of their teachers and families."","html":""We are incredibly proud of our learners and their commitment to academic excellence," said the school's deputy principal, Ethon Alexander. "Their success in this competition reflects not only their talent but also the support of their teachers and families.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Fraaisig Primary School community congratulates the team and wishes them the very best as they prepare to represent the school on the provincial stage.","html":"The Fraaisig Primary School community congratulates the team and wishes them the very best as they prepare to represent the school on the provincial stage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""We eagerly await the finals and look forward to celebrating their continued achievements," said Alexander.","html":""We eagerly await the finals and look forward to celebrating their continued achievements," said Alexander."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
